message:
test(bd-1wbc): add PendingRequests and RequestSender edge-case tests

Cover PendingRequests default/new equivalence, sequential ID generation,
remove prevents routing, route_response without id, null result fallback,
dropped receiver safety, cancel_all clears state, empty cancel_all noop,
Debug format, RequestSender transport failure error + cleanup, clone, and
Debug (4 → 17 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
